name: Momentum Revenue Workflow Automation API
what_it_does: Revenue workflow automation platform with REST API — connecting Salesforce CRM data to Slack for real-time deal alerts, automating account summaries, surfacing at-risk opportunities in sales channels, enabling collaborative deal reviews in Slack, and syncing notes and signals back to Salesforce.
use_cases: Triggering Slack deal alerts based on Salesforce opportunity stage changes or risk signals
Automating account health summaries delivered to sales team Slack channels
Pulling deal risk and pipeline coverage data for revenue operations reporting
Integrating Momentum signals with revenue review workflows in Slack
Automating CRM data capture from Slack conversations back to Salesforce
not_for: Sales outreach and sequencing (use Salesloft or Outreach)
Teams not using Salesforce and Slack together
best_when: A revenue operations team using Salesforce and Slack wants automated deal alerts, collaborative deal reviews, and bidirectional data sync between CRM and Slack communication channels.
avoid_when: You don't use Salesforce, your team doesn't use Slack as primary communication, or you need outbound sales engagement rather than pipeline visibility.

auth.notes: API key from Momentum account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for deal events and stage changes. Salesforce OAuth required for CRM access. Slack OAuth required for workspace integration. Multi-OAuth integration pattern.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; contact sales for pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user subscription; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $25M Series A (2022). Backed by Sequoia, Bessemer. Salesforce + Slack native integration as core differentiator. Revenue Signal alerts surface real-time deal risks in Slack. Account summarization and deal coaching in-context. Strong product-market fit in enterprise SaaS revenue teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for deal signals, alerts, accounts, and pipeline data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Requires Salesforce + Slack both configured before meaningful data is available. Webhook for deal stage changes and risk events. Account summary generation is async.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Deal reads fully idempotent. Signal reads idempotent. Account reads idempotent. Pipeline reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: Both Salesforce and Slack required — no standalone deployment option
Deal signals require historical Salesforce data to calibrate — ramp-up period
Salesforce OAuth + Slack OAuth + Momentum API key — three auth layers
Annual contract typical — significant investment before API integration
Revenue Signal rules require configuration in Momentum admin — not API-driven

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Salesforce revenue data plus Slack channel access is privileged combination — implement least privilege for both OAuth scopes. Deal data in Slack channels requires channel access control review.
